summary: The rise to 194 days in fiscal 2023 coincided with DCWP's settlement of a large, complex case against Chipotle covering roughly 100 store locations and over 9,200 employees, the kind of multi-site investigation that takes longer to close. Median closure time then fell in fiscal 2024 and 2025 as a growing share of investigations involved simpler, faster-resolving app-based delivery-worker pay cases.
oneLiner: decreasing since a large multi-site case in FY23 gave way to simpler cases
